cost_sharing_note: Patient standard specialist copay is $30 per visit (office visit only). The $600 reflects cost-sharing for an outpatient procedure (CPT 67028 = intravitreal injection) and specialty pharmacy, which have different cost-sharing tiers than routine specialist office visits. Please review your Summary of Benefits for procedure-specific cost-sharing.
